title: Odysseus + Gemma-4 26B & FREE APIs: RIP Hermes & OpenClaw! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Odysseus is an open-source AI workspace that enables self-hosting of local language models with integrated features for chat, AI agents, deep research, blind model comparison, and productivity tools like notes, memory, calendar, and email. It supports models like Gemma through Ollama and can connect to external providers like OpenRouter and NVIDIA NIM.
